_label_note: CN Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. Generated checksum-invalid Resident ID/USCC labels were removed from strict must_detect.
